center.id: loc-格朗德特爾島-新喀里多尼亞-ffab91bc
center.name: 格朗德特爾島 (新喀里多尼亞)
center.summary: 格朗德特爾島 (新喀里多尼亞)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括新喀里多尼亞鸚鵡、新喀鸦、New Caledonian island thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The New Caledonian island thrush used to have a large distribution in New Caledonia on Grande Terre, where it was mainly found in dry forests, particularly on the west coast of the island. The last confirmed sighting of the bird on Grande Terre was in 1928 and it was considered extinct until being rediscovered on the islands of Yandé and Néba in 1978

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The New Caledonian parakeet is endemic to the island of Grande Terre in New Caledonia, inhabiting an area of around 2800 square kilometres across the island. Historically, the species inhabited all forested habitats on the island. Today, it prefers oligotrophic rainforests growing on both ultramafic and non-ultramafic soil over all other habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits only the main island, Grande Terre, and one of the Loyalty Islands, Maré Island
